jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at 5paisa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
